title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 27 - 2017: Colorado Ski Areas in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog describing his day in Boulder: picking up his car after repairs, a tire blowing up unexpectedly, and spending time fixing up his website. He also briefly showcases a digital panorama project he made featuring Colorado ski resorts.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: resigned acceptance — car is falling apart but he's just rolling with it
excited but overwhelmed — hadn't realized how far behind it had gotten, finds fixing it satisfying
tight but managing — has backup options like selling a motorcycle if needed

claims.subject: Kyle
